added.title: Trump imposes 50% tariff on Canadian autos, alcohol and dairy under Section 338 of the 1930 Tariff Act on Monday July 20 — covers ~$20B of goods including milk/cream, hockey equipment and wine; oil, potash, fish, critical minerals and existing Section 232 steel/auto duties excluded, effective in 30 days
added.note: First deployment of Section 338 of the 1930 Tariff Act in modern trade policy — major escalation with USMCA already in non-renewal limbo.
